title: rubus radula subsp. discerptus
intro: Rubus radula subsp. discerptus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain anthraquinones and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus radula subsp. discerptus include its potential to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by combining the leaves and roots with hot water, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
